title: anthyllis abyssinica
intro: Anthyllis abyssinica, also known as Abyssinian kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species native to Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues, kidney stones, and other kidney-related problems due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis abyssinica include its ability to reduce pain and discomfort associated with kidney stones, alleviate symptoms of cystitis, and even help manage fever and swelling. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis abyssinica are often made from its dried roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or used in combination with other herbal remedies to create medicinal tinctures.
